title: Antigravity
description: Reverse gravity. Now you have to worry about not flying away!
body:
## Description
Reverse gravity. Now you have to worry about not flying away!

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RI3LbMrF/images/5dfbcb6d7b17b1e73d440159f8e6b7a578373223.jpeg)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
